query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_deleted, SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_deleted FROM employees WHERE status = 'Ativo'
